zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes von Arnstein於大約1120年出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲海-拉-可萊斯希爾巴可洛斯特 阿恩斯坦時，她的父親Count Ludwig von Arnstein II41歲，母親Udelhilde von Odenkirchen31歲。她於1135年與Heinrich I. von Geldern結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1179年之前在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德，埋葬在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 韋塞爾海貝格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes von Arnstein于大约1120年出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲海-拉-可萊斯希爾巴可洛斯特 阿恩斯坦时，她的父亲Count Ludwig von Arnstein II41岁，母亲Udelhilde von Odenkirchen31岁。她于1135年与Heinrich I. von Geldern结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1179年之前在荷兰蓋爾德藍德，埋葬在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 韋塞爾海貝格。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Arnstein
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from either of two places in northern Bavaria named Arnstein (‘eagle's crag’).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes von Arnstein was born about 1120, in Kloster Arnstein, Seelbach, Rhein-Lahn-Kreis, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, her father, Count Ludwig von Arnstein II, was 41 and her mother, Udelhilde von Odenkirchen, was 31. She married Heinrich I. von Geldern in 1135. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died before 1179, in Zutphen, Gelderland, Netherlands, and was buried in Rheinberg, Wesel, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes von Arnstein est née environ 1120, à Kloster Arnstein, Seelbach, Rhein-Lahn-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Count Ludwig von Arnstein II, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Udelhilde von Odenkirchen, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Heinrich I. von Geldern en 1135. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée avant 1179, à Zutphen, Gueldre, Pays-Bas, et a été enterrée à Rheinberg, Kreis Wesel, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes von Arnstein um 1120 in Kloster Arnstein, Seelbach, Rhein-Lahn-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Count Ludwig von Arnstein II 41 und ihre Mutter Udelhilde von Odenkirchen 31. Sie hat 1135 Heinrich I. von Geldern geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb vor 1179 in Zutphen, Geldern, Niederlande und wurde in Rheinberg, Kreis Wesel, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes von Arnstein è nata il circa 1120 nel Kloster Arnstein, Seelbach, Rhein-Lahn-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, sua padre, Count Ludwig von Arnstein II, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Udelhilde von Odenkirchen, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Heinrich I. von Geldern nel 1135. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì prima del 1179, nel Zutphen, Gelderland, Paesi Bassi, e fu sepolta a Rheinberg, Kreis Wesel, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes von Arnsteinが約1120年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズルヘイン-ラン-クレイスセエルバチクロスター アルンステインで生まれた時，父Count Ludwig von Arnstein IIは41歳，母Udelhilde von Odenkirchenは31歳であった。1135年にHeinrich I. von Geldernと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1179年以前にオランダジェルダーランドズトフンで死去し，ドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレイス ウエセルルヘインバーグにて埋葬された。

ko.Kloster Arnstein, Seelbach, Rhein-Lahn-K: 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 리이-라h-크레이스 시바치 클로스터 아른스타인

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes von Arnstein(이)가 대략 1120년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 리이-라h-크레이스 시바치 클로스터 아른스타인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Count Ludwig von Arnstein II(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Udelhilde von Odenkirchen(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1135년 Heinrich I. von Geldern(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1179년 이전 네덜란드 글델랜드 주트프에서 사망했으며 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 크레이스 웨셀 리인버그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes von Arnstein nasceu aproximadamente 1120, em Kloster Arnstein, Seelbach, Rhein-Lahn-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, seu pai, Count Ludwig von Arnstein II, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Udelhilde von Odenkirchen, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Heinrich I. von Geldern em 1135. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 1179, em Zutphen, Gheldria, Países Baixos, e foi sepultada em Rheinberg, Kreis Wesel, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha.

ru.Kloster Arnstein, Seelbach, Rhein-Lahn-K: клостир арнстин, силбач, раин-лахн-крис, раинланд-пфалз, Германия
ru.Arnstein, Nassau Germany: арнстин, крис виценаусен, хессен-нассау, Пруссия, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes von Arnstein родилась около 1120 г. в местности клостир арнстин, силбач, раин-лахн-крис, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, её отцу по имени Count Ludwig von Arnstein II было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Udelhilde von Odenkirchen, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Heinrich I. von Geldern в 1135 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла перед 1179 г. в местности зутфен, джелдирланд, Нидерланды и была похоронена в местности раинбирг, крис весел, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия.

Se casó con Heinrich I. von Geldern en 1135. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas.
